name: pikka-dev
onCreateCommand: apt update && apt install software-properties-common build-essential git protobuf-compiler -y && go install google.golang.org/protobuf/cmd/protoc-gen-go@latest &&go install google.golang.org/grpc/cmd/protoc-gen-go-grpc@latest &&  git config --global user.email 'brmk' && git config --global user.name 'brmk'
